title: Once Seen And No More.
content:
Thousands each day pass by, which we,
    Once past and gone, no more shall see.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Once Seen And No More.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
